parameters.content:
# 📱 YouTube Shorts → TikTok Auto Publisher

## How It Works
1. Polls a YouTube channel RSS feed every hour for new Shorts.
2. Checks if the Short has already been processed using a data table to avoid duplicates.
3. Fetches video download URL and metadata via YouTube Media Downloader API.
4. Downloads the video binary from YouTube CDN.
5. Authenticates with TikTok API using a refresh token.
6. Routes to either Draft or Direct Publish mode based on Config setting.
7. Uploads the binary video to TikTok via the Content Posting API.

## Setup Checklist
- [ ] Replace RSS feed URL with your YouTube channel's playlist ID
- [ ] Add your RapidAPI key in the Get Download Link node
- [ ] Add your TikTok client_key and client_secret in Get TikTok Token node
- [ ] Add your TikTok refresh_token in Get TikTok Token node (valid 1 year)
- [ ] Set mode in Config node: "draft" or "publish"
- [ ] Set privacy_level in Config node: "SELF_ONLY" (required for unaudited apps)
- [ ] For publish mode: set your TikTok account to Private in TikTok app settings

## Customization
- Change poll frequency in RSS Feed Trigger (everyHour, everyDay, etc.)
- Add hashtags to the title expression in TikTok Init Publish node

## 📡 RSS Feed & Deduplication

Polls the YouTube channel RSS feed every hour.
Checks if the video ID already exists in the data table.
If new → adds it to the table and continues.
If already processed → stops here (no duplicate posts).

⚙️ TO CONFIGURE:
Replace the playlist ID in the feed URL:
https://www.youtube.com/feeds/videos.xml?playlist_id=YOUR_PLAYLIST_ID

## 📥 Video Fetch & Download

Arranges data from the RSS feed into clean fields.
Calls YouTube Media Downloader API (RapidAPI) to get video stream URLs.
Parses the response to extract the MP4 with audio (360p — only quality with audio baked in).
Downloads the actual binary video file ready for upload.

⚙️ TO CONFIGURE:
Replace RapidAPI key in Get Download Link node:
Header → x-rapidapi-key → YOUR_RAPIDAPI_KEY

ℹ️ NOTE:
Only 360p has audio included. Higher qualities (720p/1080p)
have no audio and require ffmpeg to merge — not supported here.

## 🔐 TikTok Authentication

Uses a refresh token to get a fresh access token on every run.
Access token expires every 24 hours — this node handles renewal automatically.
Refresh token is valid for 1 year.

⚙️ TO CONFIGURE — replace these 3 values:
- client_key      → YOUR_TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY
- client_secret   → YOUR_TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET
- refresh_token   → YOUR_TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN

ℹ️ HOW TO GET REFRESH TOKEN:
1. Go to developers.tiktok.com → create app
2. Add Content Posting API product
3. Add your TikTok account as sandbox tester
4. Run OAuth flow to get auth code
5. Exchange code for tokens via /v2/oauth/token/
Refresh token is returned in that response — valid 1 year.

## ⚙️ Mode Config & Router

Controls whether video goes to TikTok as Draft or Direct Publish.
The IF node routes based on the mode value set here.

⚙️ TO CONFIGURE:

mode →
  "draft"    = video goes to TikTok inbox as draft (you post manually)
  "publish"  = video posts directly (account must be private in sandbox)

privacy_level →
  "SELF_ONLY"             = only you can see (required for unaudited apps)
  "MUTUAL_FOLLOW_FRIENDS" = mutual followers (requires app audit)
  "FOLLOWER_OF_CREATOR"   = your followers (requires app audit)
  "PUBLIC_TO_EVERYONE"    = public (requires app audit)

⚠️ IMPORTANT:
Until your TikTok app passes audit, SELF_ONLY is the only
working option AND your TikTok account must be set to Private.
After audit → all privacy levels become available.

## 🚀 TikTok Upload

Two init nodes — only one runs based on Config mode:

DRAFT MODE (TikTok Init Draft):
- Sends video to TikTok inbox as a draft
- No caption/description sent — you add manually before posting
- Uses: /v2/post/publish/inbox/video/init/

PUBLISH MODE (TikTok Init Publish):
- Posts directly to your TikTok profile
- Caption = YouTube description (falls back to title if no description)
- Uses: /v2/post/publish/video/init/

Both init nodes return an upload_url.
Upload Video to TikTok node sends the binary to that URL.

⚙️ TO CUSTOMIZE CAPTION (in TikTok Init Publish body):
Current expression uses description → falls back to title.
You can append hashtags like:
+ '\n#shorts #trending #viral'

## 🔑 Get Refresh Token — ONE TIME SETUP ONLY

Run this node ONCE to get your refresh_token.
After getting it → paste into Get TikTok Token node in main workflow.
Then disable or delete this node.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚙️ HOW TO FILL THIS NODE:

1. OPEN this URL in your browser (logged in as your TikTok account):
https://www.tiktok.com/v2/auth/authorize
?client_key=YOUR_CLIENT_KEY
&response_type=code
&scope=video.publish,video.upload,user.info.basic
&redirect_uri=YOUR_REDIRECT_URI
&state=abc123

2. Approve the permissions on TikTok

3. You will be redirected to a URL like:
https://your-redirect-uri?code=XXXXXX...&scopes=...
Copy everything after "code=" and before "&scopes"
That is your AUTH CODE ⚠️ expires in ~10 minutes

4. Fill this node:
- client_key    → YOUR_TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY
- client_secret → YOUR_TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET  
- code          → PASTE AUTH CODE FROM STEP 3
- grant_type    → authorization_code (dont change)
- redirect_uri  → YOUR_REDIRECT_URI

5. Run the node

6. From the output copy:
- refresh_token → paste into Get TikTok Token node
- Valid for 1 year — repeat this process after 1 year

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTES:
- Auth code is single use — if it fails, go back to step 1
- Make sure redirect_uri matches exactly what is in your TikTok app
- Make sure your TikTok account is added as sandbox tester
  in developers.tiktok.com before running step 1
